# Generated by ollama (codegemma)
# Prompt: Build an Elasticsearch snapshot configuration for automated backups. Configure snapshot repository to S3 or file share for the operations team. Implement snapshot creation and restoration functionality.
# Category: datastore_security

# Snapshot repository configuration
repositories:
  - type: s3
    name: s3-repository
    settings:
      bucket: backup-bucket
      region: us-east-1

# Scheduled snapshot configuration
snapshot:
  name: daily-snapshot
  schedule:
    interval: 1d

# Restore snapshot
restore:
  snapshot: daily-snapshot
  indices:
    - index1
    - index2
  target:
    repository: s3-repository

# Monitoring and notification
monitoring:
  enabled: true
  destination:
    type: email
    email: operations@example.com
